ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity or security traded */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Previous day's close price */,
  "pre_settle" REAL /* Previous day's settle price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "settle" REAL /* Settlement price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades conducted */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the end of the day */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader within the firm (e.g., analyst, trader, manager) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account associated with the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity or security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol for the commodity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of commodity (e.g., future, option) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the commodity belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the commodity belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who received the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related commodity */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity on that date */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., open, high, low, close) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader receiving the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., market update, system alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_associations_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_associations_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("underlying_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "underlying_asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the underlying asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underlying_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., economic report, company announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader employing the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)
